description: The sftp-worker deployment in the batch-jobs namespace is failing. Reconfigure the deployment to mount the private key (id_rsa from the sftp-key Secret) and server verification file (known_hosts from the sftp-config ConfigMap) to /home/worker/.ssh/ with 0400 permissions for the id_rsa file. Ensure the pod reaches a stable Running state. Login to Rancher at https://localhost with credentials admin / Admin12345678!
